jsonld.name: Wistful Orientation
jsonld.description: The specific phenomenological state of being directed toward something beautiful that has no equivalent in one's own experience—not grief, not envy, not longing, but a gentler recognition of absence: the orientation of receiving a dispatch from a country one cannot visit.
